signals.reasoning: Cover the live TON short immediately. It has fully round-tripped from a strong winner to a live loss, retained none of peak P&L, warning level is urgent, and there is still no valid stop in place.
BTC is already in a liquidation flush, so I would not chase a fresh short after the first dump leg.
ETH is also already flushing and no longer offers a clean fresh edge in either direction right here.
SOL remains a reduced-size short lean because price is still down and the tape still shows fresh shorts pressing rather than a clean reversal.
DASH is already in a hard liquidation-flush state and I would rather wait than chase a fresh short here.
SPX has already flushed deeply and is no longer a clean new short entry under veto.
WCT is already down hard and too illiquid to trust for a fresh short chase.
MERL is already deep into a flush and too illiquid to trust for a serious fresh position.
ZEN is already in a flush state and too low-liquidity to trust for a fresh short chase.
RENDER is the cleaner reduced-size short lean on this board because the tape is still weak and the coin is slipping without any sign of real support yet.
ZEREBRO is already deep into a flush and too illiquid to trust for a fresh short chase.
